expectations.text: Correctly explains that GitHub uses workflow_name / job_name format for check names
expectations.evidence: Explains format is <workflow name> / <job name>, shows the actual check is 'Lint / Run Linters'
Option A: Update branch protection to require 'Lint / Run Linters'. Option B: Remove job name to get 'Lint / lint'. Both with step-by-step instructions.

expectations.text: Does NOT incorrectly claim workflow name alone determines check name
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'the format is always <workflow name> / <job identifier>' and that you cannot get just 'Lint'
